content.text:
If you're seeking a top-quality HydraFacial in Katy, Texas, here are several reputable medspas to consider:

**[Rich & Rooted Medspa](https://richandrootedmedspa.com/?utm_source=openai)**  
**Open now · Medical spa · 4.8 (17 reviews)**  
_24022 Cinco Village Center Blvd Suite 120 2A, Park Row, TX 77494_  
Specializes in high-end, non-surgical aesthetic treatments, including HydraFacials, in a tranquil, upscale environment.

**[Selah MediSpa](http://www.selahmedispa.com/?utm_source=openai)**  
**Open now · Medical clinic · 4.8 (421 reviews)**  
_21715 Kingsland Blvd #100, Katy, TX 77450_  
Offers HydraFacial treatments aimed at rehydrating the skin and rejuvenating appearance through a three-step process.

**[4Ever Glow Salon & MedSpa](https://4everglowmedspa.com/?utm_source=openai)**  
**Open now · Medical spa · 4.9 (110 reviews)**  
_722 Katy Fort Bend Rd #500, Katy, TX 77494_  
Offers luxurious beauty and wellness services, including HydraFacials, with a focus on personalized treatments.

**[Luminous MediSpa](http://www.luminousmedispa.com/?utm_source=openai)**  
**Open now · Medical spa · 5.0 (134 reviews)**  
_410 W Grand Pkwy S #310, Katy, TX 77494_  
Provides advanced HydraFacial treatments to revitalize and rejuvenate the skin, tailored to individual needs.

**[Katy Med Tech Spa](http://www.katymedtechspa.com/?utm_source=openai)**  
**Open now · Facial spa · 4.9 (1292 reviews)**  
_25145 Star Ln #1002, Katy, TX 77494_  
Provides HydraFacial treatments known for brightening and firming the skin, ideal before events or for regular maintenance.

**[Aesthetica MD Med Spa](https://aestheticamdcypress.com/?utm_medium=organic&utm_campaign=gbp&utm_source=openai)**  
**Open now · Medical spa · 4.9 (179 reviews)**  
_8118 Fry Rd #1304, Cypress, TX 77433_  
Offers HydraFacial treatments that cleanse, exfoliate, and hydrate the skin, suitable for all skin types.

**[Restore Hyper Wellness](https://www.restore.com/locations/tx-katy-tx014?utm_medium=Yext&y_source=1_MzE2Mjk5MzUtNzE1LWxvY2F0aW9uLndlYnNpdGU%3D&utm_source=openai)**  
**Open now · Medical spa · 4.9 (281 reviews)**  
_23116 Cinco Ranch Blvd, Katy, TX 77494_  
Offers Hydrafacial Keravive Scalp Treatments to cleanse hair follicles and support natural hair growth.

Each of these medspas offers HydraFacial treatments tailored to various skin types and concerns. It's advisable to contact them directly to discuss your specific needs, inquire about pricing, and schedule a consultation to determine the best fit for you.
